overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded assassin character traversing a desert canyon at sunset. The character moves from a narrow rocky passage through an open palm-filled valley and approaches ancient Egyptian temple ruins with stone columns and red banners.

agents.ego_description: running through a narrow canyon path toward the distant opening where palm trees are visible

tall red rock wall forming the right side of the canyon passage
group of palm trees visible at the exit of the canyon
sandy dirt trail winding through the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character running through a narrow desert canyon enclosed by high red rock walls on both sides. The path is a sandy dirt trail leading toward a cluster of palm trees visible in the distance. The lighting is warm and backlit by the setting sun ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert valley with scattered palm trees and distant rock formations

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into a wide open valley with scattered palm trees

agents.ego_description: running across open desert terrain toward distant temple ruins visible on the horizon

notable_agents.action: bird flying high overhead in the sky

entered.detail: large red rock outcrops and mountain formations in the distance
palm trees dotting the left side of the valley
palm trees dotting the right side of the valley
stone temple structures with columns visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the canyon into a wide open desert valley bathed in golden sunset light. Scattered palm trees line both sides of the path while distant rock formations and ancient temple ruins become visible ahead. A bird flies overhead in the clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian temple entrance with stone columns and red banners

events.description: approaching the stone temple ruins with tall columns and hanging banners
ambient light darkens to twilight as the character enters the temple gate area with burning braziers

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the ancient temple gate between large stone columns

entered.detail: tall ancient stone columns marking the temple entrance
red fabric banners hanging between the stone columns
fire-lit braziers illuminating the temple entrance
ancient stone wall ruins flanking the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the ancient temple entrance, passing between tall stone columns adorned with hanging red banners. The sky darkens to twilight as burning braziers provide warm light near the temple gate. The surrounding desert gives way to historic stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined desert canyon into a vast valley that culminates at the entrance of an ancient temple. It begins with a character running along a sandy trail enclosed by high red rock walls, moving toward a distant cluster of palm trees under a warm, backlit sun. As the character emerges from the narrow passage, the scene opens into a wide desert valley bathed in golden light, where scattered palms line the path and distant ruins appear beneath a clear sky. The camera then follows the character toward the temple entrance, passing between towering stone columns draped with red banners. Finally, the surrounding desert gives way to historic stone architecture as the sky darkens to twilight and burning braziers cast a warm glow over the temple gate.
